/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-g++ -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -fno-common -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter --specs=nano.specs -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -Wl,--gc-sections --specs=nano.specs --specs=nosys.specs -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -T/root/myproject/adam/MaixPy-K210-STM32/linker/stm32f407_flash.ld -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,-Map=/root/myproject/adam/MaixPy-K210-STM32/build/rtthread/MaixPy_rtthread.map CMakeFiles/maix_hal_module.dir/__/startup/startup_stm32f407xx.s.obj -o MaixPy_rtthread.elf  lib_maix_hal_static.a ../rtos/librtthread_nano.a ../components/drivers/stm32/libstm32_drivers.a
